title: Workflow-level: maximalist->target transform/distiller stage
description: Govern a new post-generation transform stage (after the 14-spec sequence) that takes the maximalist draft to the concise target band (canonical + Sample-2 anchors). Conforms to R-0005 (distillation + coverage floors + existence-gate safety), R-0006 (option matrix + 2026 heuristics), R-0009 (extrapolation license). Option detail + sources: docs/prompt-workflow-refinement-governing-options-2026-06-08.md (R-0011).
acceptance_criteria: A post-generation transform produces a concise plan in the target band (canonical mock + Sample-2 anchors) without loss of signal.
Coverage floors are enforced: owners (incl. SAO/out-of-lesson roles), stakeholders, and measurement-tools are never zeroed by the transform.
Grounded extrapolation is permitted (distribute ownership, surface out-of-lesson roles, bilingual dual-purpose) bounded by catalogued entities + verbatim labels + no fabricated metrics + re-gating.
The transform output re-validates via the existing parse (planner/specs.py) + catalogue-gate (_freetext_audit.py) + promotion-gate (_check_promotion_gates) harness.
A distance-to-target-band scorer measures conformance (two anchors) = the DISC-26 / quality-rubric gate.
Iterate-to-band uses a judge model distinct from the generator (grounded self-correction).
Optionally, the 5 step-iterating specs may fan out per action-step (per-step parallel decomposition).
